Job Post Details

Mobile Engineer (Flutter) - job post

Akar Inti Teknologi
Jakarta

Detail lowongan

Jenis lowongan

  • Full-time
&nbsp;

Lokasi

Jakarta
&nbsp;

Deskripsi Lowongan Lengkap

About the Company:

Akar Inti Teknologi (AIT) is a full-service software house headquartered in Jakarta, focusing on helping companies exceed in their digital transformation. We pride ourselves on building solutions that go beyond mere functionality, aiming for reliability and scalability that exceed expectations. With a portfolio of successful projects for renowned brands across diverse industries, our track record speaks for itself.

From our roots in banking and financial institutions, we've expanded our reach into helping drive digitalization in financial services, loyalty programs, healthcare, lifestyle brands, and beyond.

Our journey has traveled remarkable distances, propelled not solely by our innovative solutions, but by the dedication and brilliance of our exceptional #AITteam. They embody our vision, drive, and unwavering commitment, taking us forward into boundless achievement. On top of this, we foster a culture of #TeamLIT (Teamwork, Learning, Innovation and Transparency), ensuring all of our #AITteam can perform and thrive to their fullest potential.

About the People:

We believe in putting our people first, creating an environment where great work is recognized, encouraged, and celebrated. With a strong emphasis on teamwork, learning, innovation, and transparency, our #TeamLIT culture empowers every team member to reach their full potential. We offer unparalleled learning opportunities and benefits designed to support both personal and professional growth.

Our team members are not just employees; they are valued collaborators, each bringing their unique strengths to the table. With a spirit of camaraderie and a focus on collective success, we welcome both seasoned professionals and newcomers to thrive together.

Become part of our journey — don't worry, you are in good hands.

About the Role:

As a Mobile Engineer (Flutter), you will be responsible for building, enhancing, and maintaining high-quality mobile applications that deliver seamless user experiences across Android and iOS platforms. You will work closely with cross-functional teams including Backend Engineers, UI/UX Designers, QA, and Product Managers to transform business requirements and product designs into scalable, performant, and maintainable mobile solutions.

Job Description:

  • Develop and maintain mobile applications using Flutter

  • Translate UI/UX designs into responsive and high-performance applications

  • Integrate RESTful APIs

  • Implement effective state management solutions

  • Perform debugging and optimize application performance

  • Write clean, maintainable, and testable code

  • Collaborate closely with Backend, UI/UX, QA, and Product teams

  • Manage build and release processes to Google Play Store and Apple App Store

  • Conduct code reviews and drive continuous improvement initiatives



Qualifications

  • Minimum 3+ years of experience as a Mobile Developer

  • Proven production experience using Flutter

  • Strong understanding of mobile application lifecycle

  • Solid knowledge of HTTP networking and JSON parsing

  • Familiar with Git and CI/CD workflows

  • Good understanding of Clean Architecture and/or MVVM pattern

  • Basic knowledge of mobile security best practices (secure storage, certificate pinning, etc.)
